purpose: Prepare PharmKG acquisition for Day 2 raw inventory.

sources_to_try.name: biomed-AI PharmKG GitHub PharmKG-8k
sources_to_try.reason: Contains pre-partitioned PharmKG-8k train/valid/test TSV files. This is the most convenient source for Day 2 inventory.

sources_to_try.name: Official PharmKG Zenodo raw archive
sources_to_try.reason: Official raw archive. Larger file. Use if GitHub split files are insufficient for entity/relation/type mapping.

sources_to_try.name: MindRank-Biotech PharmKG repository
sources_to_try.reason: Original PharmKG code repository; useful for README statistics, preprocessing notes, and Google Drive references if needed.

day2_inventory_questions: Do train/valid/test TSV files have three columns: head, relation, tail?
Is there an explicit entity type map?
Can Drug/Chemical and Disease entities be separated cleanly?
Which relation can serve as treatment/indication/therapeutic association target?
Do we need the larger Zenodo raw archive to recover entity names/types?
